title: Concealable toilet system compatible with vacuum or macerator pump systems
abstract: The invention relates to a toilet system designed for especially yachts, ships, caravans and similar mobile or non-mobile vehicles, is usable with vacuum or macerator pumps when a vacuum-like flushing system required and at the same time to provide space saving, which is preventing water from being poured down from toilet bowl while toilet bowl is closing, and height adjustable from the floor while toilet bowl is open.
claims: Claims C LAIMS 1. A concealable toilet system compatible with vacuum or macerator pump systems characterized in that comprising a carrier fixing frame (1 ); a concealable toilet bowl Â¾ (2); button shaped or featured with motion detector siphon buttons (3) and open- close buttons (3.1 ); a radio connected to the antenna in the yacht, caravan or related vehicle and building where in the concealable toilet bowl (2) is used, radio buttons (4); a macerator pump (5); a bended internal trap (6); a sewage outlet pipe (7), a clean water inlet pipe with a valve (8), a linear actuator system (9) and a spring slide 3ft bed (10). 2. A bended internal trap (6) of claim 1 characterized in that being in a direction of at least one of the left or right side of underthe inner chamber of the concealable toilet bowl (2) which is first bending towards "a" side, then it continues bending upwards "b" side and the trap outlet mouth is directed to backwards to keep the Clear water Â¾ inside and not poured out from the concealable toilet bowl (2), to completely restore the same waters original position when the concealable toilet bowl closet (2) is switched on again, to provide both to keep the water in the open condition and when it is closed, to prevent the bad odors that may be caused by the sewage side by the concealable toilet bowl (2). 3. Macerator pump (5) of claim 1 characterized in that locating at any point in the carrier fixing frame (1 ) and fixed to just below at least one of the left or right sides of the concealable toilet bowl (2). 4. Both electrically and manually operated linear actuator system (9) of claim 1 characterized in that comprising an arm system which is used to open-close and adjust the height of the toilet bowl (2) from the floor by user and a spring slide bed (10) to adjust the height of the toilet bowl (2) from the floor by the linear actuator system (9) providing the movement of upward and downward after the concealable toilet bowl (2) is opened. ttl
